name: USD+
description: USD+ is a U.S. Treasury bill backed stablecoin on Solana powered by the M0 universal stablecoin platform. It functions by automatically streaming yield from underlying T-Bills directly to holders' wallets daily, with no staking or lockups required. Designed to maintain a $1 peg, USD+ serves as a secure infrastructure for payments and treasury management, allowing users to earn returns on idle capital.
